name.description: Name of the trouble ticket, typically a short description of the issue

severity.description:
The severity of the issue (must provide choice value only):
- 1: Critical
- 2: High
- 3: Moderate
- 4: Low
- 5: Planning (Incident only)

status.description: The current status of the trouble ticket (can provide choice label or value)

ticketType.description: The type of ticket to create

name.description: Name of the contact method (can provide choice label or value, e.g., 'Virtual Agent' or 'virtual_agent')

note.description: List of work notes and comments to add to the ticket

@type.description: Type of note (determines whether recorded in Work notes or Additional comments field)

relatedEntity.description: List of impacted assets, products, sold products, configuration items, or services

id.description: Sys_id of the impacted item or service

relatedParty.description: Details about contacts for the ticket

@referredType.description:
Type of related party:
- customer: Company or account for the ticket
- customer_contact: Caller or contact for the ticket
